reasoning: CSGP's stock declined steeply in late October 2025 following a disappointing Q3 earnings release and lower-than-expected Q4 guidance. The stock fell from the mid-70s down to 67.52 on November 7, which serves as the most recent known market close prior to the November 9 cutoff. The stock has been bouncing around this level and the TS model provides a combined probability of 0.59 that it will exceed this price in the short term, factoring in seasonal effects and a likely post-drop stabilization. In accordance with the explicit instruction to regress probabilities toward 0.5 for distant dates as uncertainty increases, I anchor the first forecast at 0.58 and step it down for the 1-month and 3-month horizons.
